title: Fleet Review Board - Task Template
description: Schema establishing form fields, read-only AI analytics, and decision outcomes for human reviews of robotic lawn-mower fleet incidents in UiPath Action Center.

readOnlyContext.description: Original incident context and AI recommendations shown to the reviewer.

decision.description: The final Action Center disposition chosen by the human reviewer.

reviewerNotes.description: Mandatory audit explanation justifying the human disposition or AI recommendation override.

reviewerName.description: E-signature of the authorized fleet reviewer.

workOrderId.description: Remediation Work Order ID generated when the decision requires a field service action.
